name: Library & Information Science
student_summary: Curate and manage knowledge — libraries, archives and digital collections.
overview: Curate and manage knowledge — libraries, archives and digital collections. Library & Information Science sits in the Education Systems family of Education & Training. It is a broad career direction — you can enter it through several routes and specialize later without restarting.
who_is_this_for: You want work that serves your community or country
You keep asking why until you reach the bottom of things
You notice the small things others miss
who_should_avoid: You strongly prefer solitary desk work over this field's day-to-day reality
daily_responsibilities: Collaborate with your team using information retrieval
Keep improving at digital archiving — the field keeps moving
Communicate progress, results and decisions to the people who depend on them
work_environment: Laboratories and research facilities with focused desk analysis
scope: Demand outlook in India is strong; see FAQs for how the platform keeps this current.
ai_impact: low — AI assists rather than replaces
advantages: A broad Education Systems foundation that opens multiple specializations later
challenges: Early years demand patience before the rewards compound
misconceptions: “You must pick your exact job title now.” Library & Information Science is a direction — specialization comes later.
“Only toppers make it.” Consistent skill-building beats one exam rank in the long run.
portfolio_ideas: A documented case study of information retrieval
projects: Beginner: explore cataloguing with a small self-chosen project
Intermediate: build or run something real using Library systems
smaller_city_scope: Concentrated in bigger hubs today; smaller-city presence is growing slowly.
rural_scope: Real rural relevance — this field serves or operates in rural India directly.

transition_paths: Toward Higher Education & Professorship: build the shared skills and take a bridging project or course
Toward Teaching (School): build the shared skills and take a bridging project or course

faqs: What does Library & Information Science pay in India?
Entry roles typically start around ₹3 LPA and senior professionals reach ₹8 LPA or more. Live, region-specific salary data is retrieved by the platform when you ask.
What should I study after Class 12?
Focus on Any, English. Typical degrees: B.Lib.Sc + M.Lib.Sc. Alternatives exist: any degree + b.ed.
Will AI take over this career?
AI impact is low — AI assists rather than replaces. Broad paths like Library & Information Science evolve rather than disappear — the students who pair domain skill with AI tools benefit most.
Is this a broad path or a specific job?
Library & Information Science is a career direction. Once inside it you can specialize further — the platform will map specializations in future versions.
